arts.sum: Arsene Wenger's prediction about Wayne Rooney was scarily accurate 🤯

arts.ttl: How Arne Slot Could Escape Touchline Ban Despite Red Card After Everton 2-2 Liverpool
arts.sum: Arne Slot may escape a touchline ban despite being sent off following Liverpool's draw with Everton in the final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot red card: Lip reader explains Michael Oliver exchange as Everton vs Liverpool derby ends in chaos
arts.sum: The Liverpool boss was sent-off after the final whistle in his first experience of a Merseyside derby

arts.ttl: Everton aim cheeky dig at Virgil van Dijk after Liverpool star's Merseyside derby jibe
arts.sum: Everton had the last laugh in Wednesday's Merseyside derby against Liverpool, their last ever meeting to be played at Goodison Park before the club's move to Bramley-Moore Dock

arts.ttl: Report: Man United could make Jamie Vardy approach, unwanted Everton man also linked
arts.sum: Manchester United will look to bring in a new striker this summer as a massive priority – with two surprise names linked to the club. Head coach Ruben Amorim saw a number of names from his attack leave during the January transfer window, with Antony heading to Real Betis and Marcus Rashford joining Aston Villa.
